subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles in the contract, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask with mid tier. This requires identifying multiple entities (parties) and their associated attributes (role, contact address) across a structured but potentially complex document. Mid tier is appropriate because it must parse potentially varied contact address formats and determine role assignments for multiple parties, which may require inference from context. Not frontier-level as the extraction schema is explicit and document structure is standard for contracts.
